sections.heading: Appointment360 (contact360.io/api)
sections.prose:
```bash
cd contact360.io/api
pytest tests/ -v
pytest tests/graphql/ -v
ruff check app
mypy app
```

code_blocks.value:
cd contact360.io/api
pytest tests/ -v
pytest tests/graphql/ -v
ruff check app
mypy app

sections.heading: Connectra (contact360.io/sync)
sections.prose:
```bash
cd contact360.io/sync
go test ./... -v
golangci-lint run
go fmt ./...
```

code_blocks.value:
cd contact360.io/sync
go test ./... -v

sections.heading: TKD Job (contact360.io/jobs)
sections.prose:
```bash
cd contact360.io/jobs
pytest
pytest tests/unit/ -v
pytest tests/integration/ -v
```

sections.heading: Django (contact360.io/admin)
sections.prose:
```bash
cd contact360.io/admin
pytest
python manage.py check
python manage.py check --deploy
```

code_blocks.value:
cd contact360.io/admin
pytest
python manage.py check
python manage.py check --deploy

sections.heading: Next.js Apps
sections.prose:
```bash
npm run test
npm run test:coverage
npm run test:e2e
```

npm run test:coverage

sections.heading: Frontend Codebases
sections.prose:
```bash
cd contact360.io/app && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
cd contact360.io/root && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
cd contact360.io/email && npm run test && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
```

sections.heading: Lambda and Backend(dev) Services
sections.prose:
```bash
cd lambda/emailapis && pytest tests/ -v
cd lambda/emailapigo && go test ./... -v
cd lambda/logs.api && pytest tests/ -v
cd lambda/s3storage && pytest tests/ -v
cd "backend(dev)/contact.ai" && pytest tests/ -v
cd "backend(dev)/salesnavigator" && pytest tests/ -v
cd "backend(dev)/mailvetter" && <service_test_command>
cd "backend(dev)/email campaign" && <service_test_command>
```

code_blocks.value:

cd "backend(dev)/mailvetter" && <service_test_command>
cd "backend(dev)/email campaign" && <service_test_command>

sections.heading: Lint and Type Safety
sections.prose:
```bash
ruff check .
ruff format .
mypy .
npm run lint
npm run typecheck
```

code_blocks.value:
ruff check .
ruff format .
mypy .
npm run lint
npm run typecheck

sections.heading: Minimum Pre-Release Test Gate
sections.prose:
- Unit tests pass
- Integration tests pass
- Lint/type checks pass
- Core health endpoints return expected status

items.text: Core health endpoints return expected status

sections.heading: Small Task Breakdown
sections.prose:
1. Run unit tests.
2. Run integration and e2e tests where available.
3. Run lint and type checks.
4. Fix regressions and rerun.
5. Attach test evidence to release cut.

items.text: Run integration and e2e tests where available.
Attach test evidence to release cut.

sections.heading: 1) Contract-Level Tests
sections.prose:
- API contract tests (GraphQL/REST schema and status mappings)
- Backward compatibility checks for critical fields

items.text: API contract tests (GraphQL/REST schema and status mappings)
Backward compatibility checks for critical fields

sections.heading: 2) Service-Level Tests
sections.prose:
- Unit tests per service
- Integration tests for service dependencies (DB, queue, storage, external clients)

items.text: Integration tests for service dependencies (DB, queue, storage, external clients)

sections.heading: 3) Surface-Level Tests
sections.prose:
- Dashboard/marketing/email UI unit and e2e checks
- Extension flow smoke checks

items.text: Dashboard/marketing/email UI unit and e2e checks

sections.heading: 4) Non-Functional Checks
sections.prose:
- Lint and type checks
- Basic performance smoke for critical paths where available

items.text: Basic performance smoke for critical paths where available

sections.heading: 5) Release Evidence
sections.prose: - Include command outputs, pass/fail summary, and unresolved exceptions (if any)

items.text: Include command outputs, pass/fail summary, and unresolved exceptions (if any)
